allow: Bash(echo "File not found, checking for recent logs" ls -la /private/tmp/claude-502/-Users-jarrydhawley-Desktop-Predictor-PerryPicks-v4/tasks/*.output)

Bash(echo "Backend not responding, checking database directly..." python3 -c " from dashboard.backend.database import SessionLocal, Game, Prediction from datetime import date db = SessionLocal\(\) try: today = date.today\(\) games = db.query\(Game\).filter\(Game.game_date >= today\).all\(\) print\(\) print\(''=== Games from Database ===''\) for g in games[:15]: print\(f''{g.away_team} @ {g.home_team} - {g.game_status or ""Scheduled""}''\) preds = db.query\(Prediction\).order_by\(Prediction.created_at.desc\(\)\).limit\(5\).all\(\) print\(\) print\(''=== Recent Predictions ===''\) for p in preds: game = db.query\(Game\).filter\(Game.id == p.game_id\).first\(\) if game: print\(f''{game.away_team} @ {game.home_team}:''\) print\(f'' H1: {p.h1_away}-{p.h1_home}''\) print\(f'' Predicted Total: {p.pred_total:.1f}''\) print\(f'' Predicted Margin: {p.pred_margin:+.1f}''\) print\(f'' Home Win Prob: {p.home_win_prob:.1%}''\) print\(\) finally: db.close\(\) ")

Bash(# Find and kill the existing Odds API process pkill -f ""uvicorn app.main:app.*8890"" || true sleep 2 # Restart it cd ../Odds_Api && \\ source .venv/bin/activate && \\ ODDS_PROVIDER=composite PORT=8890 nohup python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8890 2>&1 & echo ""Waiting for Odds API to start..."" sleep 5 # Check health curl -s ""http://localhost:8890/v1/health"")
